title: lappa minor var. pubens
intro: Lappa minor var. pubens, also known as the woolly ginseng or woolly bittercress, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Lappa minor var. pubens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction, and has been used in herbal medicine for centuries, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine.
